name: Microsoft MAI Models
summary: three in-house models via Azure Foundry: MAI-Transcribe-1 beats Whisper on 25 languages, MAI-Voice-1 generates 60s audio in under 1s, MAI-Image-2 ranks #3 on Arena image leaderboard

name: Veo 3.1 Lite
summary: accessible text-to-video and image-to-video model — Veo 3.1 Fast pricing slashed to open up developer access for solo creators and small teams

name: Google Gemma 4
summary: four open-weight models (2B–31B) with Apache 2.0 license — runs on a Raspberry Pi or Mac Mini, built from Gemini 3 research, most permissive Gemma release yet

name: Runway Characters API
summary: real-time video agents with face + voice in the API — generate HD video in ~100ms, Builders Fund with 500K free API credits for early-stage projects

name: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live
summary: real-time voice model in the developer API — build conversational voice apps with low latency, successor to Gemini 2.5 Flash Native Audio

name: Mistral Speech
summary: open-source text-to-speech model for building voice agents — Apache 2.0, competes with ElevenLabs at zero licensing cost

name: Claude Computer Use (Mac)
summary: Claude can now control your Mac — clicks, types, opens apps — to complete multi-step tasks hands-free, available to Pro/Max subscribers today

name: GPT Image 1.5 API
summary: image editing and generation in the API at $0.009/image — 4x faster than v1, strong image preservation for in-app editing flows

name: o3 and o4-mini
summary: o3 replaces o1 as OpenAI's flagship reasoning model and can think with images mid-reasoning; o4-mini matches near-o3 quality at a fraction of the cost

name: Llama 4 Scout & Maverick
summary: first natively multimodal Llama models using MoE architecture — Scout fits on a single GPU, Maverick matches GPT-4o on key benchmarks, both Apache 2.0

name: Gemini 2.5 Pro
summary: experimental thinking model that topped the LMArena leaderboard — 1M token context, standout coding and math performance, successor to Gemini 2.0

name: GPT-4.5
summary: OpenAI's largest and most knowledgeable non-reasoning model — improved emotional intelligence, reduced hallucinations, strong at open-ended writing and nuanced tasks

name: Claude 3.7 Sonnet
summary: first hybrid reasoning model — toggle between instant responses and extended thinking; strong coding and agentic tasks, with expanded computer use capabilities

name: Grok 3
summary: xAI's flagship trained on 10x compute of Grok 2 — includes DeepSearch for real-time web research and Think mode for step-by-step reasoning

name: Deep Research
summary: agentic research tool that browses the web for minutes and synthesizes findings into a detailed report — o3-powered, available in ChatGPT Pro

name: Sora
summary: text-to-video model released publicly after a year of previews — generates up to 20-second HD clips with a Storyboard editor for multi-scene control

name: Gemini 2.0 Flash
summary: multimodal model with real-time audio/video streaming, native image generation, and agentic tool use — faster than 1.5 Pro with a 1M token context window

name: Claude 3.5 Haiku
summary: fastest and most affordable Claude 3.5 model with vision — outperforms Claude 3 Opus on most benchmarks at a fraction of the cost, available via API
